54063.title: Stanley Tucci: Searching for Italy
54063.description: Stanley Tucci eats and drinks his way around Milan. Here, Stanley enjoys an aperitivo, feels inspired to make pizzoccheri, a noodle made from buckwheat, and enjoys classic Milanese veal chops and risotto.

54076.title: Stanley Tucci: Searching for Italy
54076.description: Stanley Tucci explores his former home: Tuscany. Stanley does a wine bar crawl, celebrates the importance of the lowly loaf and samples dishes that use stale bread as the key ingredient.

54265.title: Stanley Tucci: Searching for Italy
54265.description: Stanley Tucci visits Sicily. Here, Stanley tries a salty and crunchy sensation, tastes the grapes grown in the region's unique soils, and reflects on the nature of Sicilian hospitality.
